title: Vegan Moroccan Harira Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful vegan stew inspired by Moroccan cuisine, made with robust vegetables and harira.

ingredients.name: robust
ingredients.notes: any robust vegetable will do, such as eggplant or zucchini

ingredients.name: light
ingredients.notes: such as bell pepper or onion

ingredients.name: moroccan
ingredients.notes: dried or fresh mix of spices, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: harira
ingredients.notes: or 1 can of harira, drained and rinsed

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped light and robust vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the moroccan spice mix and salt, stir well.
Add the harira and 2 cups of water, stir well.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
